overview: Kling's superpower is expressive character motion — it handles human body language, facial expressions, and physical performance better than most video models. The community (r/aivideo, Kling Discord) has mapped that motion amplitude modifiers are the key lever: the difference between 'walks' and 'walks slowly, each step deliberate, shoulders slightly hunched' is dramatic. Expression language triggers facial performance. Kling also handles camera movement cleanly when separated from subject motion.

motion_amplitude.description: Motion amplitude words control how much and how the subject moves. This is the #1 lever practitioners have found.

expression.description: Kling generates facial performance from expression language better than most video models.

camera_movement.description: Specify camera motion separately from subject motion.

subject_detail.description: Physical description feeds the performance simulation. Clothing, age, physical details matter.

mood.description: Mood language shapes the overall energy of the motion — Kling reads it well.

power_patterns: [Subject in physical detail], [action with amplitude modifier], [expression description]. [Camera]. [Lighting]. [Mood].
[Subject] walks [adverb] through [environment], [physical detail of movement]. [Facial expression]. Camera: [type]. [Atmosphere].
antipatterns: Vague motion — 'a person walks' vs 'an elderly woman shuffles with measured care, each step testing the ground'. The second triggers completely different physics.
Ignoring expression for character shots — Kling reads expression language literally. Use it even for subtle moments.
Mixing camera and subject motion without separation — 'the camera tracks the running man' is less effective than 'man runs, camera tracks alongside at waist height'.

strong: A woman in her 50s, elegant but worn, sits alone in a cafe. She stirs her coffee slowly, almost mechanically. Her gaze drifts to the window. A slight, involuntary smile forms, then fades. Camera: static medium shot, gradually tightening to close-up. Soft warm cafe light. Melancholic, intimate.

Young boy runs toward camera across a beach, arms wide open, laughing open-mouthed. Movement: exuberant, full-body, stumbling slightly. Camera: low angle tracking shot, moving backward. Golden hour. Joyful, kinetic.
weak: A woman sitting at a cafe looking sad.
A boy running on the beach.
